title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・夕空に響く

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I... ran in the autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I was able to put up a decent fight and deliver,
even in a high-level race.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I didn't think about my limits... I just raced my
way, and I grasped something great.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...At this rate, I'm going to reach my dream, aren't
I?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: My dream of becoming a star.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I... I want to...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I want to get closer to being a shining star!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I have a favor to ask you.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
The Arima Kinen is going to be the last race of my
senior year. So before that, I want to run one
more race.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I want to gain more confidence. I want a victory in
a race that I'm determined to win from the start.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I want to run a race where I truly believe in myself
and my abilities... only then can I run in the Arima
Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The old Nice Nature would probably be seeking
self-confidence in further races, but she doesn't
need that now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She has that confidence. What she wants now... is
strength.
choice_data_list: It'll be back-to-back. Is that okay?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I'm sure it'll be just fine!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
What can I say? Down-and-dirty running is my
forte.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I'll never use stamina or fatigue as an excuse not
to run. So... can I?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Thank you! I'll leave the decision of which race up
to you.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I'm tagging you in for the heavy thinking!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Looking at her previous races and considering the
remaining time until the Arima Kinen, I decide the
best choice is...
choice_data_list: How about the Chunichi Shimbun Hai?
How about the Chunichi Shimbun Hai?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although a lower-tier race, it's an event where
Nice Nature is sure to deliver results. We can
confidently aim for first place!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Chunichi Shimbun Hai. Now that's a good
choice... I'll finish first there.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I'll win and then I'll face her proudly!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...Anyway, what should I have as a reward for
today? Fishcakes, perhaps?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After leaving the racecourse, as usual, we stop by
the shopping district at Nice Nature's request.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Dootie-do-doo! ♪ Dootie-doo! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's Nature!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Teio!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
What're you up to? Hanging out with your
trainer? Aren't you two cute! ♪

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Nah, we just finished a race, actually.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Is that right? Congrats! I went to karaoke!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You have to practice for your concerts too, you
know!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Ouch, don't mention that...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Dootie-do-doo! ♪ Dootie-doo! ♪

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Ah! That song...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
It's the song for the coming Arima Kinen. I have
to memorize it.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
It's the culmination of our senior year! There's no
way I'm not running!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I won't give up the center position to anyone
either. No matter who I'm up against!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...I don't expect anything less. You're always
looking ahead.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: You're competing there too, right?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Yeah, but... how did you know?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You've been doing pretty well lately. Plus, I don't
skimp on information gathering!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I... had no idea you were aware of me...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Tell me something, Nature.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Are you willing to bet everything you have to
beat me?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Let me tell you, I'm constantly exceeding my
limits. If you come at me half-heartedly, you
won't stand a chance.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
A race is only worthwhile if I compete against the
best and beat the pants off them.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
So I'm gonna ask you one more time... Do you
really think you can beat me now?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...W-well, I—

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper A
text_block_list.text: There's no way Natie will lose!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
What? What are you sa—wait, what are you guys
doing?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Without us realizing it, everyone from the
shopping district has gathered around us.

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper B
text_block_list.text:
Why are you so quiet, Natie? This girl is taunting
you!

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper C
text_block_list.text:
Come on, show us that same ferocity you show us
when you ask for a discount!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Th-this is not the same as haggling!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: It doesn't matter what the people around you think. What do you think, Nature?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I... That's...

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper A
text_block_list.text:
It's okay, Natie, you're stronger than before!
You're unbeatable now!

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper B
text_block_list.text:
You've got us, Natie! There's nothing to be scared
of!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Uuugh...

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper C
text_block_list.text: Get her, Natie!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Ugh! All right!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I'm going to win!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I going to beat you and shine like the star I am!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
...Heh. That's what I was waiting for. I see it
now—your determination.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Looks like this is shaping up to be a lot more fun
than I expected. Don't let me down.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Hahaha. Sigh.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Now I've done it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nice Nature's mournful cry echoes across the
evening sky.
